message:
test(fwc): enforce required artifact and log-field contracts on host integration fixtures

- Extend fixture_matrix.json with required_artifacts and
  required_log_fields for all 7 archetypes; session-oriented fixtures
  (streaming, webhook, polling, browser) additionally require
  session_transcript.json
- Add mechanical enforcement in cual_fixtures.rs and cual_integration.rs:
  every fixture must declare core host bundle artifacts (trace.jsonl,
  summary.json, environment.json, replay.sh) and log fields
  (correlation_id, phase)
- New test: session_oriented_host_integration_fixtures_require_session_transcript_artifacts
- Fix clippy clone warning in host_integration_discovery.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+      ],
